membership.title: Upgrade Membership
membership.description: Choose a plan for your analytics capacity, AI workflows, collaboration, and reporting needs.
membership.downgradeDescription: Downgrading may reduce your available resources. Existing data will be preserved, but you may not be able to add new websites or members until you are within the new plan limits.
membership.confirmationError: Your subscription approval could not be verified. Please try again.
membership.checkoutError: Unable to start checkout. Please try again.

free.name: Free
free.description: Perfect for side projects and early experiments. Get core analytics with 100K events/month across 5 websites.
features: Core analytics, API read access, and 50 MCP calls/day

starter.name: Starter
starter.description: For growing projects that need more capacity, AI workflows, and regular delivery of analytics insights.
features: CSV export and daily or weekly email reports
3 basic alert rules and unlimited AI analyses

pro.name: Pro
pro.description: For teams that need collaboration, richer automation, and advanced analytics.
features: Unlimited MCP calls and 300 API requests/minute
CSV and JSON export, 5 webhooks, and Slack alerts
AI anomaly detection, advanced funnels, and priority support

team.name: Team
team.description: For multi-product teams and agencies that need scale, governance, and branded delivery.
features: 20 members, unlimited goals, and unlimited data retention
Unlimited MCP calls and 600 API requests/minute
20 webhooks, 100 alert rules, and 200 AI reports/month
SSO/SAML, white-label controls, and AI forecasting

enterprise.name: Enterprise
enterprise.description: For organizations with custom volume, security, support, and deployment requirements.
features: Custom event, API, MCP, website, and member capacity
Advanced identity, branding, and integration requirements
